lernziele:
• Know the main approaches of smart city concepts and how they relate to spatial planning and sustainability of urban infrastructures.
  • Understand human-centered smart city concepts and their dimensions.
  • Understand the importance of data and technology for spatial planning.
  • Evaluate existing smart city concepts.
  • Develop parts of a smart city concept or a technology.

kurse.lernziele:
• Know the main approaches of smart city concepts and how they relate to spatial planning and sustainability of urban infrastructures.
  • Understand human-centered smart city concepts and their dimensions.
  • Understand the importance of data and technology for spatial planning.
  • Evaluate existing smart city concepts.
  • Develop parts of a smart city concept or a technology.
kurse.planinhalt:
• Smart City concepts in the Swiss and global context
  • Reflection on different dimensions of Smart City concepts, especially in terms of:
    • public involvement and participation
    • governance of Smart Cities
    • smart city infrastructures such as energy systems, supply and disposal, mobility and logistics
  • Technologies of the Smart City
  • Spatial data concepts and data protection in the context of a spatial data policy
  • Development of parts of a smart city concept or technology
